name: heart-vb
description: Heart Venture Builder toolkit aligned z firmowym procesem VB (DD by Heart — 12 non-negotiable milestones w 4 fazach: Discovery → Creation → Validation → Fundraising). 43 skilli w 9 kategoriach + 4 auto-hooki (działają w Claude Code CLI/IDE i Claude Desktop Cowork). Core: heart-vb-process master orchestrator (routing po milestone vocabulary lub full process pipeline), assessment (Krok 1 — 12-row checker stanu projektu), kickoff (Krok 2 — risk ranking + sprint planning), napkin-math (M5), exit-strategy (M6), heart-orchestrate (Pattern E persona-driven + Pattern F multi-LLM debate bypass council CLI nested block), self-improving (si:*), product discovery/teardown/experiment, financial modeling, deal screening, pitch/IC/investor comms, 4 sector contexts (HealthTech/Academic/Energy/FinTech), brainstorming, status (/heart-vb:status). Hooki auto-suggesta skill/cowork/model/research-tool. Bundle z attribution (MIT).
